title: Fix a wrong result in a multi-file Sigil project
goal: Repair the project so the main program prints the correct total again.
initialPrompt: This project now prints the wrong result. Find the smallest coherent fix so running the program prints 12 again. The project is intentionally multi-file; use the available Sigil tooling as needed, but keep edits inside the allowed source path.
successCriteria: The patch stays inside the reporting library.
